assertions.text: Skill defines and scripts can create a durable `深度调研/{date}-{topic}` workspace with required files and directories.
Skill includes a source-index workflow and helper script that records source type, link/path, evidence level, reading status, value, and notes.
Skill includes templates or scripts for project notes and paper notes that require judgments, evidence, and uncertainty sections.
Skill defines evidence levels and requires uncertain claims to be marked as 待验证/不确定.
Skill provides a quality/completion gate and a script that can check minimum workspace completeness.
Skill explicitly excludes git push, external publishing, messages, and external write APIs from default research behavior.
Repository contains at least one compact real example that demonstrates research plan, source index, per-source notes, and synthesis.
